category.title: Search
category.summary: Search engines and site-specific search workflows

entries.title: Baidu Search
entries.summary: Baidu search: Chinese-language queries, fallback when Enter does not submit, use when local results matter

entries.title: Google Search
entries.summary: Google search: default choice for general English or international queries, supports advanced operators

entries.title: Bing Search
entries.summary: Bing search: image and video search, Microsoft ecosystem tasks, alternate engine when Google is not preferred
